Partnership Process

How Working Together Works

Simple, fast, and professional. Here's what the process looks like from inquiry to live content.

01
Submit Inquiry
Fill out the contact form with your product, goals, and timeline. I'll respond within 24 hours.
02
Strategy Call
We align on deliverables, messaging, talking points, and what success looks like for your brand.
03
Content Creation
I create the content, you review a draft. Two revision rounds included as standard.
04
Go Live + Report
Content publishes on schedule. You receive a full performance report with views, clicks & engagement.

About AJ

The Creator
Behind TooGoodTech

I'm AJ — tech creator, honest reviewer, and the voice behind TooGoodTech. I built this channel on one principle: your audience deserves the truth about the products you put in front of them.

With 78 videos and partnerships with brands like FIFINE, Hume Health, and Stellar Data Recovery, I know how to present a product authentically — in a way that actually drives purchase decisions rather than just views.

My audience is 25–44, tech-savvy, and buying on desktop and TV. They trust my recommendations because I only say yes to products I can genuinely stand behind.

Tech ReviewsGadgets How-ToSmart Home Phones & LaptopsHonest Takes
🎯
No-Fluff Reviews
Real testing, real results — built to drive purchase decisions, not just watch time.
🔬
Deep Dives
Benchmarks, comparisons, long-term testing — thorough coverage your brand can be proud of.
🤝
Brand Experience
3 paid partnerships completed with FIFINE, Hume Health & Stellar Data Recovery.

Audience Trust
Sponsored or not, my opinions are my own — and my audience knows it. That trust transfers to your brand.
